title: Login Authentication Failure
description: Users reporting 500 error when attempting to log in via OAuth.

title: Dashboard Loading Latency
description: Main analytics dashboard taking over 10 seconds to render for premium accounts.

title: Typo in Billing Invoice
description: The word 'Quantity' is misspelled as 'Quanity' on PDF exports.

title: API Rate Limit Increase Request
description: Customer requesting a higher tier for their production environment.

title: Password Reset Email Not Sending
description: Automated recovery emails are not reaching users with @outlook.com domains.

title: Mobile App Crash on iOS 17
description: App closes immediately after splash screen on the latest iOS update.

title: Dark Mode Contrast Issues
description: Text is barely readable in the settings menu when dark mode is enabled.

title: Database Connection Timeout
description: Intermittent timeouts occurring during peak hours in the US-East region.

title: Feature Request: Export to Excel
description: User wants to export transaction history to .xlsx instead of just .csv.

title: Expired SSL Certificate
description: The staging environment URL is throwing security warnings.

title: Broken Link in Footer
description: The 'Privacy Policy' link leads to a 404 page.

title: New User Invitation Error
description: Admin cannot add users with special characters in their names.

title: Integration with Slack Failing
description: Notifications are not appearing in Slack channels as configured.

title: Missing Search Filter
description: There is no way to filter tickets by 'Date Range' in the admin panel.

title: Account Overcharge Issue
description: Customer was billed twice for the monthly subscription in February.
